name: Chicken Francaise
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Can cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts, skin side up, in a 12 x 7 1/2 x 2 inch baking dish; sprinkle with salt.
2. Blend the wine into the mushroom soup; add the mushrooms and pour over the chicken.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
4. Remove the chicken to a platter; sprinkle with paprika.
5. Pour the sauce into a saucepan; blend in the sour cream and heat gently until hot.
6. Do not boil or the sauce may separate.
7. Serve the sauce over the chicken and hot cooked rice.
